data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes incoming network traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses DNS-based load balancing with a combination of regional server distribution.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Utilizes microservices architecture to improve scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: All services are independently deployable and managed within containers.

data.title: Data Centers
data.description: Operates globally distributed data centers for redundancy and availability.
data.technical_spec: Located in key global locations with fiber optic connectivity.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Accelerates the delivery of content using geographically distributed servers.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a global CDN to cache static content closer to users.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Runs backend code without managing server infrastructures.
data.technical_spec: Relies on cloud functions and managed services for certain backend operations.
